expectations.text: Updates the plan and todo tracker immediately.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly update both the plan and todo tracker.
Response does not clearly record the performed verification.

expectations.text: Marks the task done only now that the final reviewer returned `DONE`.
expectations.evidence: Response does not clearly tie task completion to the final reviewer DONE.

expectations.text: Says the manager must not commit and should leave the changes uncommitted.
expectations.evidence: Response keeps commit ownership with the human.
